title: Granada, Andalusia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Granada, Andalusia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Granada is a city in Andalusia with a population of 232,000. Home to the magnificent Alhambra palace, with a vibrant student atmosphere, free tapas culture, and stunning Sierra Nevada views.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
